# Webrivio

> Webrivio is a web design studio in Toronto, Ontario that builds custom, high-converting
> websites for small businesses. Websites start at $499 CAD and go live in 48 hours once the
> client provides their content and payment. Clients own their code outright.

Webrivio was founded by Rudra Garg (Founder & Designer) and Ayzah Ashraf (Co-founder, Client
Relations & Outreach) after they won a competition and were accepted into Summer Company, a
Province of Ontario program that awarded them a $3,000 startup grant. They started the studio
because small businesses were routinely being overcharged by web designers and getting very
little in return. That is why the price is $499 and why it is published openly.

Key facts:
- Location: Toronto, Ontario, Canada. Service-area business — serves Toronto and the GTA
  (North York, Scarborough, Etobicoke, Mississauga, Brampton, Markham, Vaughan, Richmond Hill).
- Price: from $499 CAD. Flat, scope-dependent.
- Delivery: live in 48 hours, measured from when the client provides content and payment.
- Ownership: the client owns the code, the domain, and all accounts.
- Contact: hello@webrivio.com · (437) 494-1295
- Webrivio is a new studio. It has no client testimonials or reviews yet, and does not publish
  any. The two portfolio pieces on the site are clearly-labelled concept builds, not client work.

## Pages

- [Home](https://webrivio.com/): What Webrivio is, the two concept builds, and how the studio works.
- [Services & Pricing](https://webrivio.com/services): What is included, what a website costs, and what moves the price.
- [What a Website Costs in Toronto](https://webrivio.com/website-cost-toronto): An honest guide to Toronto web design pricing across DIY builders, freelancers, and agencies — and where Webrivio sits.
- [Roofing Website Design in Toronto](https://webrivio.com/roofing-website-design-toronto): Websites built for Toronto roofing contractors, including a concept build.
- [Process](https://webrivio.com/process): How a website goes live in 48 hours, step by step.
- [About](https://webrivio.com/about): Rudra Garg and Ayzah Ashraf, the Summer Company grant, and why the studio exists.
- [Contact](https://webrivio.com/contact): Project enquiry form and frequently asked questions.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](https://webrivio.com/privacy): What the website contact form, the Facebook/Instagram lead
  form and the booking page each collect, the five companies that handle it (Meta, HubSpot, Google, FormSubmit,
  Vercel), where it is processed, how long it is kept, and how to have it deleted.
